decisions.decision: Create a single test file `frontend/src/__tests__/ui-components.test.tsx` covering ProbabilityBar, Spinner/LoadingPage/ErrorMessage, and StatusBadge
alternatives_rejected: Separate test files per component (matches codebase convention but task spec is explicit about a single file)

decisions.decision: Use real implementations of `formatProbability` and `statusColor` — no mocking of utility functions
alternatives_rejected: Mocking utilities (adds complexity, no existing test in the codebase mocks utilities)
renderWithProviders (unnecessary — none of these components use context/router)

decisions.decision: Test Spinner size prop via SVG width/height attributes; do not test internal SVG structure (circles, keyframes)
alternatives_rejected: Deep SVG structure testing (couples tests to markup implementation details)

decisions.decision: ProbabilityBar edge cases: multi-outcome happy path, missing marginals defaulting to 0, empty outcomes array. Skip color-wrapping and all-zero tests.
alternatives_rejected: Testing color wrapping beyond 8 outcomes (pure modulo arithmetic, not component behavior)

steps.task: Create `frontend/src/__tests__/ui-components.test.tsx` with describe blocks for ProbabilityBar, Spinner, LoadingPage, ErrorMessage, and StatusBadge

Write ProbabilityBar tests: (a) renders outcome names and formatted probabilities, (b) uses title attributes with `name: probability` format, (c) missing marginal entries default to 0%, (d) empty outcomes array renders without crashing
Write Spinner tests: (a) renders SVG element, (b) default size is 24x24, (c) custom size prop controls width/height attributes
Write LoadingPage test: renders an SVG element (proving Spinner is present) with size 32
Write ErrorMessage test: renders the provided message text, has danger-colored styling
Write StatusBadge tests: (a) renders status text, (b) different statuses produce different border colors via statusColor, (c) text is in original case in DOM (CSS handles uppercase)
Run `npx vitest run src/__tests__/ui-components.test.tsx` and fix any failures
